programme.title: Liquid Edge Ep102
programme.desc: Liquid Edge leaps into canyon pools with the Deap Canyoning Team, captures a first waterfall descent with kayak superstar Steve Fisher, showcases surf cinematographer Larry Haynes, searches the world for secret surf spots via the film Planet Blow, and features an epic swell via Oakley’s Wave of the Winter.

programme.title: Blue World Ep508: Shark’s “Tonic Immobility” + Diving with NASA
programme.desc: Neal Harvey, a world-renown shark handler in the Bahamas, teaches us how to put Reef Sharks into a relaxed state known as tonic immobility. Then, we head to NASA’s Neutral Buoyancy Lab in Houston, where astronauts train for space walking underwater.

programme.title: The Surfing Lifestyle Ep104: In Search of Perfect Waves
programme.desc: A key component of The Surfing Lifestyle is to venture to lesser travelled parts of the world in search of perfect waves, and Dru Adler, Adam Bennetts and their surfboard shaper Daniel MacDonald, did exactly that in southern Sumatra where they found uncrowded perfection and adventure around every turn.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep110: The Ship Sinkers
programme.desc: Mothballed, de-commissioned naval vessels are toxic time-bombs, filled with PCB’s, asbestos, lead paint, oil and grease. Hundreds rust in dockyards around the world. What can be done with them? A team of Canadians has developed an innovative solution…they clean the ships...then sink them!

programme.title: Assisted Living
programme.desc: After watching Spencer Schubert’s part in the Torment snowboarding film, “Good Sport,” Mikey Leblanc found himself inspired to get back on the toboggan. One phone call later and the newly formed duo got to work filming "ASSISTED LIVING.” This short-film will have you icing your knees in no time.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Brighton Resort - Episode 01
programme.desc: In our latest MICRODOSE series we aim to explore the most influential resorts and iconic locations in snowboarding history, starting with—that’s right—Brighton Resort in Salt Lake City, Utah. Welcome to Brighton Resort Episode 1 of 5. For many riders young and old, Brighton Resort will forever be the epicenter of the snowboarding world. The plentiful snowfall, terrain parks, lift ops, cat drivers, mechanics, management, cafeteria, cooks, and mountain culture are all first class. Back in the early days, very few ski resorts were willing to take a chance on the newfound “lifestyle sport” of snowboarding, but Brighton took the leap. In doing so, Brighton made all the difference. Within a few years, hundreds of ski areas around the world came to see Brighton’s approach to snowboarding as the gold standard. From the biggest vacation destinations to the smallest trash heaps covered in fake snow, everyone (whether they’ve known it or not) has borrowed from the Brighton playbook. This has made it possible for millions of would-be snowboarders to make their first turns safely in-bounds via rope-tows, chairlifts, and gondola rides. Newbies need not traipse into the backcountry with no snow sense and little skill. For this we have Brighton to thank.

programme.desc: The competition that closes the madness that has happened at the Longines Jumping International in La Baule is definitely the Grand Prix. For a grand total of 200,000 euros, riders face a first round and a jump-off with a height of 1.60m. There is no mistake that, at a ranking of CSIO 5*, this is one of the toughest competitions in France only possible for the top equestrian athletes.Watch the highlights for La Baule Grand Prix 2019.

programme.title: Horse Academy Pro - Chapter 1
programme.desc: We begin this chapter rating and voting the student boxes organization at the stables and learning some tips on how horses should be taken care of in the stables. We will clean our equipment properly before feeding the horses and then we will be receiving Doctor Menegon, the voice for the Italian and International horse-riding competitions and introducing our special guest Rolf-Göran Bengtsson. Tune in on the Episode 2 Chapter 1 of Horse Academy Pro, exclusively on HorseTV!

programme.title: Longines Global Champions Tour - Episode 2 - Madrid
programme.desc: Competition of the LGCT 2021 continues in the Club de Campo Villa de Madrid as the second leg of this event takes place in sunny Spain. Six top-level Longines Ranking CSI5* classes will take place in the LGCT Grand Prix of Madrid and riders will be able to change the total points in the standings.Watch the second leg of the 2021 LGCT competition.

programme.title: Global Champions League - Episode 2 - Madrid
programme.desc: After Valkenswaard United won the first event of the Global Champions League in Doha, all other teams are starting to realize they will have to compenetrate perfectly to stand a chance. The stakes are high in the Club de Campo de Madrid and the obstacles in the course get in the way of the riders to become the best team show jumping riders. Relive the best moments of the GCL 2021 in Madrid.

programme.title: Al Shira'aa Highlights - Grand Prix
programme.desc: Horse riders from all over the globe compete for victory under the blazing sun at the Al Shira'aa Grand Prix. The Al Shira’aa International Horse Show has just launched their fourth edition, and riders are ready to engage in the most brilliant performances to become the winners of the competition.Watch this 4-star event that turned Abu Dhabi into the capital of International Show jumping.

programme.title: time2Rlx - Night Sky

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Do you want to feel like a racing driver without being limited to a race track? If so, the British manufacturer Radical is the right choice, as the company builds race cars with road approval. Their RXC is a powerful and agile racer.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: One of the most beautiful GT car models is the Maserati Gran Turismo S. With the 570GT, English sports car manufacturer McLaren introduced its first grand tourer. It was supposed to be the most comfortable but still very sporty McLaren.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Nissan's all-wheel monster GT-R had to prove its winter suitability and the new Porsche 911 with turbo engine was taken to its limits in Finnish Lapland. Also: the Mercedes-Benz S 500 plug-in hybrid.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Porsche's 911 Turbo S Cabriolet is a timelessly elegant all-rounder and nevertheless more of a cruiser than a sports vehicle. In direct contrast, the Rolls Royce Dawn provides luxury and elegance at a new level.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Lexus was one of the pioneers when it comes to electric and hybrid cars. The brand's LS 600h, the BMW Active Hybrid 7 and the Porsche Panamera S E-Hybrid are prime examples of this mixture between combustion and electric propulsion.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: They are big, heavy and embody the American way of driving: luxury SUVs like the Cadillac Escalade, classic pick-up trucks like the iconic Ford F-150 or Uber pick-ups like the Dodge RAM.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Aston Martin V12 Vantage S Roadster with its 6-litre V12 engine is probably the most amazing export from the UK. In addition: a mountain cruise from dawn to sundown with the Corvette C7 Convertible.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: Functional transporters offer high payload and lots of storage space, and the new Volkswagen Crafter is no exception. How does it fare in comparison to the iconic Mercedes Sprinter? Also: the nearly indestructible and also iconic Unimog by Mercedes.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Silvretta Hochalpenstrasse in Austria is the ideal playground for the lightweight power packs Lotus Elise and Roding Roadster. Also: the elegant but still very powerful Porsche 911 Targa 4S.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: With the i8, BMW tried to show the automotive world that they were ahead of their time. But why would anybody pay much more for a car that’s slower and less affordable than the brand's M4 and less spacious than the M5?

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: We took a look at Mercedes-Benz's first convertible model in their S-class. Also: for the Chevrolet Camaro's 50th anniversary in 2016 the brand released the sixth generation of their classic. And: a mountain cruise with the Corvette C7 convertible.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Three extraordinarily sporty SUVs are the Porsche Macan Turbo, the Mercedes GLA 45 AMG and the Audi RSQ3. Each of these is able to easily cope with each season of the year and, in regards to performance, could be mistaken for a sports car.

programme.title: EcoFin Documentary
programme.desc: “We’re just two surfers that decided we could no longer ignore plastic pollution in our oceans.” –Luise Grossmann.Two young innovators created the first sustainable surfboard fin based on ocean-recycled plastics. The founders of FiveOceans give ocean rubbish a new life, using plastic collected from the Indian Ocean, proving it is possible to close the cycle with ocean waste and high quality surf gear.In this stunning documentary, they prove their mission and reveal a transparent value chain of the waste material to design a performance product for surfers. With their background in engineering, the unrivalled story is underlined by surfing, adventure and great personalities as the two friends battle their way to achieve a much higher goal: reducing the plastic that ends up in the oceans they surf.

programme.title: Discovering Rhodes - Part 1
programme.desc: In this episode we will visit the old town and the palace of the grand master, before we refresh ourselves in the Kallithea Springs, and discover why Rhodes is considered as the sailing Mecca of the Dodecanese. We’ll take a trip to the beautiful Stegna beach to dive in the immaculate crystal blue waters, before venturing out on a SUP, a stand-up paddle board, to experience the unique and ever-growing practice of SUP Yoga. Finally, we’ll visit Panagia Tsambika, a hilltop monastery considered by some to be miracle-working.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E43 - Diana A Day In The Life
programme.desc: When Diana got engaged, she was constantly in the media's eyes. Throughout her life, she focused on her sons and committed herself to charity work, like speaking out against land mines. Diana used her fame to bring attention to this and other important issues. This well-researched show takes a closer look at one of the 20th century's most amazing people. With never-before-seen footage, it shows her path from a shy teen to becoming the beloved Diana, Princess of Wales, including touching moments from her last days.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E08 - Princess Diana The Uncrowned Queen
programme.desc: This show offers a captivating look into the extraordinary life of one of the 20th century's most fascinating women, seen through an American lens. It features clips from the auction where her dresses were sold.

programme.title: Diana: In Search of Happiness
programme.desc: Experience an in-depth look at Princess Diana, the extraordinary woman of the 20th century. Featuring unique interviews and touching clips, this portrait captures her incredible journey to fame and her ability to overcome the emotional and physical challenges she encountered nearly every day.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E06 - Princess Diana's Legacy
programme.desc: Reflecting on Diana's legacy, this show delves into what Princess Diana left behind after her sudden passing - the impression she left on her children, the royal family, and the people who loved her. The young princes drew admiration with their demeanor at her funeral, but many questioned how their bond with Prince Charles would be moving forward.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E17 - Remembering Diana Princess Of Wales
programme.desc: Remembering Diana, Princess of Wales includes scenes from her state funeral and heartfelt words from her closest friends. It's a warm and reflective look at Diana both as a person and a public figure: the queen that never was and the princess who'll always be remembered.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E42 - Diana A Model Princess
programme.desc: Diana's fashion sense was something people often looked at closely. She had a knack for picking outfits that were both stylish and sophisticated, which always grabbed attention. Her hats were another standout feature; she often wore elegant designs that added a touch of grace to her look. Her hair was also iconic, usually styled neatly with a slight bounce, perfectly framing her face and adding to her elegant appearance.

programme.title: The Postman's White Nights
programme.desc: Quiet drama about the Russian soul, corruption and the postman from Lake Kenozero in northern Russia.

programme.title: The Dreamed Path
programme.desc: After a vacation romance, Kenneth and Theres lose sight of each other. But fate brings them together again 30 years later.

programme.title: Gisela
programme.desc: Authentic, haphazard and unromantic, three residents of a high-rise housing estate search for love, friendship and sexuality.

programme.title: The Grass is Greener Everywhere Else
programme.desc: Either the grass is greener, or the houses are bigger, or the sun is warmer ... anywhere else is better.

programme.title: Paradies! Paradies!
programme.desc: Kurdwin Ayub, a member of the European Film Academy, tries to find out why his father falls into euphoria at the very mention of Kurdistan.

programme.title: Hashtag: School Trip
programme.desc: A school class visits the Auschwitz concentration camp in Poland. Buckle up in the bus, go to the toilet, a birthday song for Anja.

"I'm a city kid - born in the smog." Delicately and with great poetry a group of young parcours artists recapture the urban space of their home city of Vienna.

programme.title: It's Worth The Dirt
programme.desc: Wondering if you should give up because progress feels slow? Wisdom isn’t choosing what’s easiest, it’s choosing what’s worth it. If you’re tempted to quit because it’s hard, remember: God uses pressure and patience to prepare you for something greater.

programme.title: Not Something, But Someone

programme.title: Embrace Your Place

programme.title: On My Way Back
programme.desc: When it feels like God’s taking you the long way, remember: He’s worthy of your wait. If you’re feeling discouraged or struggling with obedience while you wait, start by being honest with God about where you are and trusting that His timing is always working for your good.

programme.title: Begin With Amen
programme.desc: There are seasons and situations we write off — God could never use that. But Jesus already knew about it when He found you, and He’s got a plan to redeem it. You might be wondering how, because you can’t see it yet. This sermon is an invitation to believe. If you want to know what God can do through your life, follow and find out.

programme.desc: Gertrudis, without mercy, throws Malena out of the Corona house; she pleadingly refuses to return to Pablo. Gertrudis and Claudio celebrate their triumph, when there is a knock at the door and we see that it is Alberto.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Gertrudis reminds Claudio of the convenience of keeping their relationship hidden to avoid raising suspicions while living the freedom of their love. Guillermo once again issues a death sentence on Alberto, should Lorena consider leaving him for Alberto. Alberto shows up at Lorena's house under the pretext of checking on Ignacio; she is terrified recalling Guillermo's threat, telling him that it's not a good idea for him to be there, but a lovestruck Alberto responds that he cannot, does not want to, nor plans to leave her life.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Ezequiel plantea de forma desinteresada ayudar a Camila a encontrar a su mamá, pero ella expresa que será un trato en que ambos ganarán. Fausto sorprende a Julia con Gregorio en el apartamento de Amelia. Max, desahoga su dolor con Astrid, a quien Camila pidió que lo ayudara a olvidarla.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Fuerte tensión cuando Max encuentra a Camila en la mansión López Méndez. Fausto y Patricia, duros y crueles, agreden a Julia, pero saben que el peor castigo vendrá de manos de su propio padre, Ezequiel.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Ezequiel pretende que Camila le entregue el cuaderno para conocer bien los detalles de la venganza. Luego, la sorprende al pedirle que se case con él a cambio de ayudarla pues si no hay boda, no hay trato ni sociedad.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila y Max se ofenden con ironías y frases hirientes. Las cuatro mujeres involucradas en la traición vuelven a reunirse para aliarse y anular a Camila, pero la Madre Isabel se impone. Tanto el Padre Tiziano como Luciano advierten sobre el peligro del matrimonio entre Camila y Ezequiel.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Ezequiel acepta que Camila no se va a casar con el por amor y hacen pactos. En Mascarada, Ezequiel anuncia el compromiso ante sus hijos y todo el personal; hay diversas reacciones.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Familiares y amigos presentes en la celebración. Impacta Camila, preciosa y deslumbrante y Ezequiel la presenta como la futura señora López Méndez, pero ésta no puede responder ante sorpresivos disparos que hieren a Ezequiel. Marcelina culpable del hecho, aclara que los disparos no eran para Ezequiel, sino para matar a Camila.

programme.title: El Retorno
programme.desc: Una extraña mujer mantiene expectante y desorientado al espectador cuando a diario habla con su hija y la presencia de su hija no aparece en ningún momento.

programme.title: 48 Horas de Terror
programme.desc: Mateo un escritor citadino adquiere una casa de campo en donde planea vivir con su esposa y escribir en la tranquilidad del campo, pero no tomo en cuenta las trágicas noticias de los acontecimientos de canibalismo que ocurrieron a manos de sus vecinos quienes solo buscan sacias su hambre.

programme.title: The Juniors y La Formula Imperial
programme.desc: Narra las vidas de 7 adolescentes millonarios que se aventuran a planificar una revolución social, generada por vídeo-escándalos y experimentos médicos, con el objetivo de generar un cambio en la ideología mundial, el conflicto entre las clases sociales y el enfrentamiento con sus muchachas de servicio doméstico.

programme.title: Fantasías
programme.desc: La historia de Brenda y Antonio, una pareja de clase media con dos hijos adolescentes y una vida sexual aburrida, en busca de nuevas experiencias, primero con su sexy sirvienta. Más tarde, siguiendo el consejo de Esther, una amiga mayor que tiene un estilo de vida swinger junto con su esposo, deciden explorar la posibilidad de despertar una nueva pasión al ligar con Miguel y Claudia, una pareja swinger. Pero luego llegan los problemas.

programme.title: Borrar de la Memoria
programme.desc: Una historia de amor se transforma en una historia de persecuciones y asesinatos sin esclarecer en el contexto de la masacre estudiantil de octubre de 1968. Más de 40 años después, un periodista tenaz se da a la tarea de aclarar los crímenes bajo condiciones muy peligrosas, con el objetivo de llevar la verdad ante la justicia. Ello representa un esfuerzo dedicado a obligar a un país a reconocer la negación de la reconciliación y el cierre de trágicos acontecimientos políticos y sociales en su historia.

programme.title: Amar
programme.desc: Carlos quiere pero Susana no. Joel no quiere pero Patricia lo obliga. Gabriel lo espera pero Martha no se lo da. Amado lo busca con una gringa y lo pierde. Benito lo tiene toda la vida. Concha se lo lleva más allá del sistema solar. Todos lo quieren y todos lo dan pero unos no lo reciben y otros quieren más. Así es Amar.

programme.title: Expediente 53 3.0
programme.desc: Un extraño ser del más allá regresa con sed de venganza para acabar con todas las personas que lo han estado atormentando por todos estos años, decidiendo poseer a Jack y darle más fuerza a Baal.

programme.title: Fantasías
programme.desc: La historia de Brenda y Antonio, una pareja de clase media con dos hijos adolescentes y una vida sexual aburrida, en busca de nuevas experiencias, primero con su sexy sirvienta. programme.title: Detour
programme.desc: El viaje de un autoestopista hacia California se convierte en una pesadilla de muerte, chantaje y encuentros fatales con una despiadada femme fatale.

programme.title: The Man with the Golden Arm
programme.desc: Un exadicto a la heroína intenta reconstruir su vida como baterista de jazz, pero el crimen, la manipulación y la tentación amenazan con arrastrarlo de nuevo a su oscuro pasado.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes and The Secret Weapon
programme.desc: Holmes debe burlar a espías nazis y a Moriarty para salvar a un inventor de miras de bombardeo.

programme.title: The Amazing Mr. X
programme.desc: Una viuda en duelo es seducida por un espiritista que afirma poder contactar a su difunto esposo, pero nada es lo que parece.
